reference: Dear annoyed patient, this could be a viral infection known as herpes simplex. Please consult with your dentist and take a course of acyclovir tablets four hundred milligrams three times a day for a week. Since it is contagious, you need to be careful to avoid spreading it.
text: If you're an ID patient, this could be a viral infection known as herpes simplex. Please consult with your dentist and take a course of acyclovir tablets, 400 mg, 3 times a day for a week. Since it is contagious, you need to be careful to avoid spreading it.
